calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.is present. Represented by Kia Baustita.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Linnell McKinney is present.
Attorney Julia M. Brighton appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Tom Lalanne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-03-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
